entries.name: Cragsong Crosskin
entries.principle: Watch together, but do not mistake watching for ownership.

entries.name: Gloamvale Crosskin
entries.principle: Not all paths must remain visible to remain true.

entries.name: Wildfur Crosskin
entries.principle: Learn the boundary well enough to meet at it.

entries.name: Tidebond Crosskin
entries.principle: Hold the current without stopping it.

entries.name: Webdusk Crosskin
entries.principle: A path must remain a path, not become a cage.

entries.name: Mudsong Crosskin
entries.principle: Clean water must still remain alive.

entries.name: Wetlands-Edge Crosskin
entries.principle: Repair the cause, not only the damage.

entries.name: Thornbloom Crosskin
entries.principle: A boundary should shelter life, not imprison it.

entries.name: Nectarbind Crosskin
entries.home: Flowering Orchard and Pollinator Guild Zone
entries.principle: A gift is not a debt.
